base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of subweapon_dagger — a projectile (melee_thrown) from 1986 castlevania. Dagger subweapon — flies horizontally in straight line. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Dagger subweapon — flies horizontally in straight line; fastest subweapon, weakest damage; cheapest heart cost (1)
